channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tipping, 5th March
item.description:
Sofa and loads of waste
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 94, Northumberland Park, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous objects, 5th March
item.description:
Please have this removed ASAP

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chester Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lights still out - Oxted court, 5th March
item.description:
I reported all of the lights being out on Oxted court a couple of weeks ago. You have sent someone to fix some of the the lights, but the two outside of my property specifically (number 9) remain broken. Please can you replace them.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hindhead Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: All out - three or more street lights in a row

item.title: Cluster of abandoned lime bikes, 5th March
item.description:
Lime bikes clustered and abandoned

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 24-25, Crescent Way, Ladywell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Camberwell Green SE5, south east entrance. Tag on bin., 5th March
item.description:
Please clear
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Camberwell Church Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped furniture, 5th March
item.description:
Dismantled furniture has been dumped on the verge opposite No73 Midhurst Hill.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Midhurst Hill, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees in ethelbert road, 5th March
item.description:
The trees are dangerous too close to residential homes and parked cars. They need maintenance to prevent falling debris damaging homes, vehicles or god forbid a person/ child.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Ethelbert Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street lighting along Nelson Mandela Road since a week ago, 5th March
item.description:
Since last week there is not street light along Nelson Mandela .road This isnot acceptable !the overgrown bushes. And bad maintenance of the path walls make it dangerous for neighbours and public also lt feels unsafe area to walk

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Nelson Mandela Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside Hunter House, 5th March
item.description:
Street light has been off for the last month or two and nobody has done anything to fix it . This creates certain stress on people walking past at night as the whole street is dark on that point.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hunter Street, King's Cross, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road surface has completely disintegrated, 5th March
item.description:
Road surface has completely disintegrated going up the hill on Vicarage road. The whole road has degraded surfaces and holes forcing drivers to go into the other lane to avoid damage. One area is as wide as the lane and about a 1m long. It was reported previously and ignored by the council and has now got worse
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Vicarage Road, Coldblow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two massive potholes at the entrance of Hazel Drive, 5th March
item.description:
Two very large potholes have shown up at the entrance to Hazel Drive and are only getting bigger. Please fix before vehicles start getting damaged!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hazel Drive, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly posted notices, 5th March
item.description:
Fly posted notices on blue column
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bellegrove Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No not dumped van, 5th March
item.description:
Van been dumped for months no mot
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Larner Road, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped White Goods, 5th March
item.description:
Dumped White Goods On The Vista Right by the school carpark

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): The Vista, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Council bin men abandoned their damaged wheelie bin, 5th March
item.description:
Council bin men abandoned their damaged wheelie bin

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sandy Ridge, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sydenham Sign not facing carriageway, 5th March
item.description:
I suspect this might fall under Lewisham’s responsibility but the location marked is classified as Bromley. Nonetheless the Sydenham / Borough of Lewisham sign has been moved and no longer faces the carriageway. Please can this be adjusted so that the sign serves its intended purpose.The sign is located opposite Tredown Road off Newlands Park.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Newlands Park, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The manhole cover on Brixton Hill is rocking, 5th March
item.description:
The manhole cover is in the bus lane on the way down the hill towards Brixton. It rattles when buses pass over it. Please investigate and fix, thank you.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brixton Hill, Streatham Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cover, 5th March
item.description:
Hi I have reported this 3 times and just cones have been put over gulley cover, as in photo cones been completely destroyed by vehicles. I'm a cyclist and this is very dangerous when vehicles are behind me I have to swerve out the way of this damaged surface. I would presume a lane closure is needed for this work but it's been like this since before Xmas.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Northend Road, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A sofa bed has been dumped obstructing the pavement, 5th March
item.description:
This is propped against the wall and looks like it might fall onto passers by. It has been there for at least one week.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 45,47, Edgehill Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light out, 5th March
item.description:
Street light out in alley making it very dark when walking through
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Penfold Lane, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Light in park or open space
